subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! The newspaper was perused. In truth, the expressions were fluent and eloquent, and in the utmost [3.5s]... ...Guide and counsel at all times the friends of God, one and all, to be occupied day and night with that which is conducive to Iran’s abiding glory
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان روزنامه ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه عبارت سلیس و روان و در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @newspapers and the media; publications, @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
